_comment: Resource-pack credit data for the README generator. Resource packs are bundled as FILES (not metadata), so this is hand-maintained. Licenses verified against each project's Modrinth/CurseForge listing or in-file LICENSE on 2026-06-05. 'verified' = confirmed; 'unverified' = could not confirm a license anywhere (README leaves the cell blank, per project policy). Update when packs are added/removed in config/paxi/resourcepacks/ or resourcepacks/.
intro: Novus ships a curated texture and animation stack, applied automatically through Paxi, plus two opt-in packs you can turn on yourself. They come in three groups: third-party packs included whole, Novus packs that merge or adapt third-party work, and the original Novus3D_* / Novus_* packs built for this pack. The original packs pull models and textures directly from the upstream "source packs" listed further down, so those upstream licenses still govern the bundled assets.
warning: Unlike the mods, which are distributed as download links plus file hashes, the resource packs are shipped as actual files. Several of the source packs below are All Rights Reserved, and a few say outright "no redistribution without permission." Bundling their assets in a publicly distributed pack goes beyond what those licenses grant. For a private group this is low-risk. Before any public release, get permission, switch to permissively-licensed sources, or leave those packs out of the public build. The credits below are given in good faith and to honor attribution-required licenses.

bundled_whole.author: Liahim85
bundled_whole.note: Bundled with credit; get permission before any public release.

bundled_whole.author: Fresh_LX
bundled_whole.note: Terms of use in the project description: modpack inclusion allowed with credit; no redistribution of the standalone pack.

bundled_whole.pack: FA Extensions — Emissive, Player, Quivers, Spiders

bundled_whole.pack: Vanilla Tweaks packs (3D Amethyst/Dripstone/Redstone Dust, Age-25 Kelp, Compass Lodestone, Disc Redstone, Groovy Levers, Visual Noteblock)

bundled_whole.note: Include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

datapacks_intro: Datapacks bundled in the pack — either applied automatically through Paxi (config/paxi/datapacks/) or merged into the KubeJS data layer (kubejs/data/). Each stays under its author's license.
